articles.title: Charles Hoskinson Addresses “Frustrating Issues” With Cardano’s New Wallet
articles.description: Cardano’s founder, Charles Hoskinson, has addressed ongoing investigations into issues plaguing the network’s new wallet, Nami. In a recent post on X (formerly Twitter), Hoskinson revealed that his team is investigating a glitch in Nami’s implementation of ADAHandles. Charles Hoskinson on Cardano Wallet Glitch Initial findings indicate a delay in fetching ADAHandles, causing a...

articles.description: In a weekend marked by dynamic shifts in the crypto market, the spotlight has turned to meme coins, with Shiba Inu (SHIB) and Dogecoin (DOGE) stealing the show.

articles.title: Breaking: BlackRock Bitcoin ETF Overtakes the Largest Silver Trust with $10B AuM
articles.description: Exchange-traded funds (ETFs) based on Bitcoin are rapidly moving up the commodity ETFs leaderboard, knocking out the largest silver trusts, with the largest gold trusts next in line. Recent statistics released by HODL15Capital reveal a significant milestone for crypto, noting that Bitcoin spot ETFs have surpassed Silver ETFs in asset management size. articles.title: Two Crypto Projects Will Likely Outperform the Market This Coming Cycle: Pantera Capital Analysts
articles.description: Analysts at crypto hedge fund Pantera Capital are naming two altcoin projects they’re optimistic about for the bull run.
